relatedComponents.name: Time Date Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system (same font sizes, opacities, tokens, dimensions).

relatedComponents.name: Calendar Plan Page
relatedComponents.relationship: This picker sets the month and year displayed by Calendar Plan Page.

subComponentsNote: No dedicated sub-components. Self-contained composite of two scroll columns.

anatomy.description: Outer surface. 375px wide, 212px tall. Background: --surface/neutral/default. No border, no border-radius.
Horizontal stripe centred vertically, spanning the full width. 31px tall. Marks the active selection row. Image asset in Figma.
Flex row containing both columns. Centred horizontally and vertically. Gap between columns: 27px. Font: Manrope Regular.
Left column (right-aligned text). Displays full month names. Always 7 fully visible items.
Right column (left-aligned text). Displays 4-digit years. In type=end, positions 5–7 use opacity-0.

variants.name: end
variants.description: The most recent available year is selected. No future years are visible — year column positions 5, 6, 7 use opacity-0.

variants.name: middle
variants.description: A year in the middle of the range is selected. All 7 year column positions are populated and visible.

scrollDepthSystem.description: Identical to Time Date Picker. Each column shows 7 items. The selected item is always at position 4 (centre). Size and opacity decrease symmetrically toward the edges.

boundaryBehaviour.end: Positions 5–7 use opacity-0 to hide future years when the most recent year is selected.

year.note: TODO: Confirm available year range and scroll boundary behaviour.

typography.note: Identical to Time Date Picker. All items use Regular weight regardless of selection state.

popupContext.triggerComponent: Plan page Header — month/year label with dropdown chevron
popupContext.confirmAction: "Confirm Date" primary button — applies the selection

usageContext: Placed inside the 'Month and Year' bottom-sheet popup on the Plan page.
Triggered by tapping the month/year label in the Plan page Header.
Confirms selection and updates the Calendar Plan Page to the chosen month and year.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App: node 1498:25479.
notes: The scroll depth visual system is identical to Time Date Picker — both must be updated together if the system changes.
The selection indicator is an image asset in Figma — implementation should use a CSS equivalent.
Month column is always fully visible in both variants.
Year column uses opacity-0 (not removed from DOM) for hidden boundary slots.
TODO: Confirm whether a type=start variant (no past years visible) is needed.
TODO: Confirm scroll boundary: hard stop vs opacity masking.
